overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character approaching the Lighthouse of Alexandria. The character traverses from a natural dirt path through a formal temple precinct with sphinx statues, briefly overlooks the bay, then approaches the lighthouse main entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: natural coastal approach with scattered trees and rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the distant lighthouse, passing mediterranean pines and rocky terrain

entered.detail: tall white stone tower with red accents and a burning flame at the top
unpaved dirt trail winding through coastal vegetation
large evergreen tree with spreading canopy
large boulders and rocky outcrops scattered along the path
low bushes and dry vegetation typical of mediterranean coast

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a natural dirt path toward the Lighthouse of Alexandria, which stands tall in the distance. The environment features scattered mediterranean pines, rocky outcrops, and coastal scrub under a partly cloudy sky during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal temple precinct with guardian sphinx statues

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt trail to stone pavement, entering the formal temple precinct with large sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking through the ceremonial entrance flanked by sphinx statues, approaching the lighthouse base

entered.detail: formal stone tile pavement with geometric patterns
large stone sphinx statue with pharaoh headdress on pedestal
matching stone sphinx statue flanking the entrance path
row of classical columns supporting the temple structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a formal temple precinct with stone pavement. The character walks between two massive sphinx statues toward the lighthouse, which now looms larger. Classical colonnades line the sides of the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront promenade with ceremonial brazier

events.description: character turns right to walk along the waterfront, revealing the bay and a lit ceremonial brazier

agents.ego_description: turning right to walk along the water's edge, observing the bay, rocky shoreline, and a burning brazier

entered.detail: calm blue water of the mediterranean bay with distant boats
large ceremonial stone bowl with burning fire on tripod legs
rocky coast extending into the water with waves lapping
white stone wall of the temple complex with red banners

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to walk along the waterfront promenade. The lighthouse moves to the left side of the frame as the view opens to the bay, revealing a lit ceremonial brazier and rocky coastline. The temple wall runs along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse main entrance with grand staircase

events.description: character turns left to face the lighthouse main entrance and begins ascending the approach

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the lighthouse and approaching the grand staircase leading to the main entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the lighthouse entrance
large doorway at the base of the lighthouse with decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to face the lighthouse directly, approaching the grand staircase leading to the main entrance. The tower dominates the center of the frame, with colonnades visible on either side and the entrance stairs ascending toward the base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged coastal trail into the formal architectural grandeur of the Lighthouse of Alexandria. It begins with the character traversing a natural dirt path surrounded by Mediterranean pines and rocky outcrops under a golden hour sky. As the terrain shifts from wild scrub to stone pavement, the camera moves through a formal temple precinct flanked by massive sphinx statues and classical colonnades. The scene then opens up as the character turns toward a waterfront promenade, momentarily revealing a lit ceremonial brazier and the expanse of the bay before turning back toward the tower. Finally, the camera faces the lighthouse directly, ascending the grand staircase toward the main entrance as the massive structure dominates the frame.
